title: tagetes oaxacana
intro: Tagetes oaxacana, also known as Mexican marigold or Aztec marigold, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tagetes oaxacana include its ability to treat wounds, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions and respiratory problems. Tagetes oaxacana can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
